title: bollito: a flexible pipeline for comprehensive single-cell RNA-seq analyses - Melanoma tutorial
author: Luis García-Jimeno
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Downsampled version of the melanoma dataset originally published by   Ho et al  (1) . The dataset is composed by cells from the 451Lu cell line. There are two samples available: 

 
	 
		 
			  Name  
			  Description  
			  R1/R2  
		 
		 
			 451LU 
			 Parental cell line 
			 2500K_451LU_L003_R*_001.fastq.gz 
		 
		 
			 451LUBR3 
			 Vemurafenib-resistant sample treated with targeted BRAF inhibitors 
			 500K_451LUBR3_L004_R*_001.fastq.gz 
		 
	 
 

  
(1) Ho YJ, Anaparthy N, Molik D, et al. Single-cell RNA-seq analysis identifies markers of resistance to targeted BRAF inhibitors in melanoma cell populations.  Genome Res . 2018;28(9):1353-1363. doi:10.1101/gr.234062.117
